nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 菲律宾
nodes.summary: 菲律宾是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联131种鸟类，包括细斑树鸭、青头潜鸭、菲律宾冢雉等131种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: Negros leaf warbler
nodes.summary: Negros leaf warbler（Negros leaf warbler，学名 Phylloscopus nigrorum），主要分布于菲律宾，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括森林砍伐。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: It is found in the Philippines

links.label: 栖息于
links.evidence: This species habitat is primary and secondary montane forest above 800 meters above sea level The IUCN does not yet recognize this as a full species but this species is not believed be threatened as it has a large range

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: However, deforestation in the Philippines continues throughout the country due to slash and burn farming, mining, illegal logging and habitat conversion
